data.title: New Horizons partners with Microsoft to include Copilot training in Office courses, enhancing workplace AI adoption.

data.title: Bonjour Québec launches "Cold Plunge" series, with host Sébastien Toutant interviewing guests in a frigid cold plunge pool.
data.description: Canadian Olympic snowboarder Sébastien Toutant, the host of "Cold Plunge," has set up a unique interview format where he places three Québécois personalities in icy cold water for the world's coldest interviews. This venture by Bonjour Québec, a social-first platform, brings a chilling twist to conventional interviews. The frozen interviews take place in the heart of Montréal and promise to push the boundaries of traditional conversations. Scheduled for February 18, 2026, this innovative project is poised to captivate viewers with an unconventional approach to engaging with guests.
